message:
test(fcp-streaming): pin backoff jitter range bounds (5r5it)

Add crates/fcp-streaming/tests/backoff_jitter_bounds.rs pinning
ReconnectConfig::delay_for_attempt invariants (reconnect.rs:93-156,
references the y54mi tightening):

  1. Floor: delay >= MIN_RECONNECT_DELAY (100ms) unless caller pinned
     a smaller max_delay.
  2. Ceiling: delay <= max_delay; even with multiplier=2 at attempt=20
     and a 5s cap, the value clamps exactly to cap.
  3. Bounded jitter: delay = base × U[0.8, 1.2] — ±20% envelope
     (tightened from ±50%).

7 tests sample 100 iterations each across attempt=0 and attempts 0..=4
to verify the jitter envelope holds, the cap is never exceeded, the
floor binds for sub-MIN initial_delay, a user-pinned cap below MIN
still wins (per the documented "respect explicit user caps" rule),
jitter disabled yields the deterministic exponential base, and the
MIN/MAX_RECONNECT_DELAY constants haven't drifted from 100ms / 30s.

The production random_float() wraps the global rand::random() and is
not seedable from outside — the envelope contract holds regardless of
which random values are drawn, which is the whole point of the
"bounded jitter" invariant being the contract under test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
